name: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
description_zh: Harness Engineering for Real Agents — 系统性学习 Claude Code Harness 工程的教程仓库，从基础到高级实践
description_en: Harness Engineering for Real Agents — A systematic tutorial repository for learning Claude Code Harness Engineering, from basics to advanced practices
ai_summary_zh: 系统性学习 Claude Code Harness 工程的教程仓库，涵盖从基础概念到高级实践的完整路径。
ai_summary_en: A systematic tutorial for Claude Code Harness Engineering covering the complete path from basic concepts to advanced practices.

name: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
description_zh: Agent harness 性能优化系统，包含 Skills、Instincts、Memory、Security 和 Research-first 开发模式
description_en: Agent harness performance optimization system with Skills, Instincts, Memory, Security and Research-first development patterns
ai_summary_zh: 全面的 Claude Code Agent Harness 优化系统，提供技能、记忆、安全等多维度的性能提升方案。
ai_summary_en: Comprehensive Claude Code Agent Harness optimization system providing multi-dimensional performance improvements including skills, memory, and security.

name: shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice
description_zh: Claude Code 最佳实践集合，包含 86 个 Tips & Tricks，涵盖 Harness 设计技巧
description_en: Claude Code best practices collection with 86 Tips & Tricks covering Harness design techniques
ai_summary_zh: 收录 86 个 Claude Code 使用技巧，是 Harness 设计实践的重要参考资料。
ai_summary_en: Collection of 86 Claude Code tips and tricks, an important reference for Harness design practices.

name: hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
description_zh: 精选的 Claude Code Skills、Hooks、Slash-commands、Agent Orchestrators 和插件列表
description_en: Curated list of Claude Code Skills, Hooks, Slash-commands, Agent Orchestrators and plugins
ai_summary_zh: Claude Code 生态系统的精选资源列表，涵盖技能、钩子、命令和编排器等核心组件。
ai_summary_en: Curated resource list for the Claude Code ecosystem covering skills, hooks, commands and orchestrators.

name: AutoJunjie/awesome-agent-harness
description_zh: Agent Harness Engineering 工具、框架和资源的精选列表，包含 8 大分类
description_en: Curated list of Agent Harness Engineering tools, frameworks and resources with 8 major categories
ai_summary_zh: 专注于 Agent Harness Engineering 的精选资源列表，系统性整理了工具和框架。
ai_summary_en: Curated resource list focused on Agent Harness Engineering, systematically organizing tools and frameworks.

name: obra/superpowers
description_zh: Claude Code 的 Agentic Skills 框架，支持 SDD 完整流程串联，可在 Claude Code 官方 Marketplace 安装
description_en: Agentic Skills framework for Claude Code supporting complete SDD workflow chaining, installable from Claude Code Marketplace
ai_summary_zh: 为 Claude Code 提供强大的 Agentic Skills 框架，支持规格驱动开发的完整流程。
ai_summary_en: Powerful Agentic Skills framework for Claude Code supporting complete specification-driven development workflows.

name: humanlayer/humanlayer
description_zh: CodeLayer 开源 IDE，用于编排 AI 编码 Agent，包含经过实战检验的工作流
description_en: CodeLayer open-source IDE for orchestrating AI coding agents with battle-tested workflows
ai_summary_zh: 开源的 AI 编码 Agent 编排 IDE，提供经过生产验证的工作流模板。
ai_summary_en: Open-source IDE for orchestrating AI coding agents with production-validated workflow templates.

name: Meirtz/Awesome-Context-Engineering
description_zh: Context Engineering 资源综合调查，从静态提示到动态上下文感知 AI 系统的演进
description_en: Comprehensive survey of Context Engineering resources, from static prompts to dynamic context-aware AI systems
ai_summary_zh: 全面的 Context Engineering 资源调查，是理解 Harness Engineering 上下文管理组件的重要参考。
ai_summary_en: Comprehensive Context Engineering resource survey, an important reference for understanding the context management component of Harness Engineering.

name: Th0rgal/open-ralph-wiggum
description_zh: 实现 Ralph Wiggum 技术的开源工具，支持 Claude Code、Codex 等 AI 编码 Agent 的自主循环
description_en: Open-source implementation of the Ralph Wiggum technique supporting autonomous loops for Claude Code, Codex and other AI coding agents
ai_summary_zh: Ralph Wiggum 技术的开源实现，通过 Hook 拦截 Agent 退出尝试，实现自主持续工作循环。
ai_summary_en: Open-source implementation of the Ralph Wiggum technique, intercepting agent exit attempts via hooks to enable autonomous continuous work loops.

name: drivelineresearch/autoresearch-claude-code
description_zh: Claude Code 的自主实验循环，给定目标、基准和文件后无限循环：尝试想法、测量结果、改进
description_en: Autonomous research loop for Claude Code: given goals, benchmarks and files, infinitely loops: try ideas, measure results, improve
ai_summary_zh: 为 Claude Code 提供自主研究循环能力，实现目标驱动的持续实验和改进。
ai_summary_en: Provides autonomous research loop capability for Claude Code, enabling goal-driven continuous experimentation and improvement.
